## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes (cargo check + clippy + tsc + eslint)
- [ ] `make test` passes (and `make test-it` if I touched SQL)
- [ ] Formatted with nightly rustfmt (`cargo +nightly fmt --all`) + `pnpm format`
- [ ] Updated docs (`README.md` / `docs/` / website) if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env` values committed
